ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "section_order" INTEGER /* Order of the section in the website */,
  "section_template" TEXT /* Template used for the section (e.g., grid, list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of the block (e.g., product, banner, promotion) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the block (e.g., HTML, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the block (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "block_category" TEXT /* Category of the block (e.g., top-selling, new-arrivals) */,
  "block_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the block (e.g., summer, sale) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the block will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_block_type FOREIGN KEY ("block_type") REFERENCES block_types ("block_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layout was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layout was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the layout (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "layout_type" TEXT /* Type of the layout (e.g., grid, list) */,
  "layout_columns" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section_layouts" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "section_layout_order" INTEGER /* Order of the section in the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id", "layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block position */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout */,
  "block_row" INTEGER /* Row number where the block is positioned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was last updated */,
  "position_order" INTEGER /* Order of the block in the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_positions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_positions_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_positions_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_types" (
  "block_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block type */,
  "block_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the block type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block version */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the block */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the block version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_versions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, designer, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section accessed */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block accessed */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., click-through rate, engagement rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_template" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_code" TEXT /* Template code (e.g., HTML, CSS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_template_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id", "template_id")
)
